properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All praise to him who reigns above In majesty supreme; Who gave his Son for man to die, That he might man redeem.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Blessed be the name, blessed be the name, Blessed be the name of the Lord; Blessed be the name, blessed be the name, Blessed be the name of the Lord. (Jesus is the Name…) (Magnify His Name…)

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: His name above all names shall stand, Exalted more and more, At God the Father’s own right hand, Where angel hosts adore.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Redeemer, Savior, Friend of men Once ruined by the fall; Thou hast devised salvation’s plan, For thou hast died for all.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His name shall be the Counselor, The mighty Prince of Peace, Of all earth’s kingdoms Conqueror, Whose reign shall never cease.
